name: delivery-studio
description: Delivery studio: turn a shaped engagement brief into a structured delivery plan — swimlanes keyed to the cast, phased work with entry/exit criteria, per-phase resourcing and contingency, and a first-class RAID register (Risks / Assumptions / Issues / Dependencies, in the Bible §8 shape). Caller-supplied-JSON materialiser: the model produces the plan, the CLI materialises it with provenance + deterministic rollups.
